title: University of Washington Symphony Orchestra
catalogDescription: Top orchestral ensemble, performing symphonic literature sic to seven times per year. title: Steelband
catalogDescription: Performing and arranging techniques for the steelband, and percussion, in a variety of Caribbean and Latin American music styles, including calypso, soca, reggae, and salsa. Credit/no-credit only. Offered: AWSp.

title: Gamelan Ensembles
catalogDescription: Explores gamelan ensembles; percussion ensembles primarily associated with musical cultures on the Indonesian islands of Java, Madura, Bali, and Lombok. Introduces basic playing techniques of selected styles of gamelan. Includes instruction in the instruments in a gamelan through study of compositions. Offered: AWSpS.
